documents.title: Generic M&A Form Library

metadata.description: Shared M&A legal operations records for browser and API use.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Up to 12% if diligence flags are documented.
rules.preferred: 8%-10% general indemnity escrow.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Fallback to 12.5% of headline value.
rules.preferred: General cap at escrow amount.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Tipping basket only for fraud or fundamental reps.
rules.preferred: 0.75%-1.0% deductible basket.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Dollar-for-dollar adjustment outside collar.
rules.preferred: Target from trailing 12-month normalized average with a collar.
rules.threshold: Escalate if target uses seller budget only.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 36 months only with founder employment covenant.
rules.preferred: 24 months, limited to products and territories used by target.
rules.threshold: Escalate broad territory or more than 36 months.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Post-closing covenant only for non-material contracts.
rules.preferred: Specified material consents as closing conditions.
rules.threshold: Escalate if top customer consent omitted.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Include cooperation covenant where no filing is required.
rules.preferred: No filing condition unless antitrust counsel confirms thresholds met.

policies.title: Northstar Buyer Risk Memo and SPA Playbook

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Only a reverse termination fee backed by creditworthy parent may be considered.
rules.preferred: Reject financing conditions.
rules.threshold: Any financing condition requires executive approval.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 10% only for identified indemnity issues.
rules.preferred: 5%-7.5% general escrow.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Fallback 10%-12.5% for general reps.
rules.preferred: Cap at escrow amount.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 0.75% deductible for competitive process.
rules.preferred: 1% deductible basket with no tipping.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Narrow customer non-solicit can extend to 4 years.
rules.preferred: No more than 3 years and limited to transferred business.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Seller can assist with transition communications.
rules.preferred: Buyer must offer comparable employment to business employees.
rules.threshold: Escalate if seller retains WARN or severance burden.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Short-form TSA may work only with complete standalone systems.
rules.preferred: TSA must cover systems, finance, HR, and IT support where assets are carved out.
rules.threshold: Escalate omitted TSA for non-standalone division.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Trademark phase-out up to 9 months.
rules.preferred: Limited transition license and clear retained-IP boundaries.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
escalation_triggers: RTF not tied to buyer breach
rules.fallback_position: 5.5% only with superior regulatory covenant.
rules.preferred: RTF at or below 5.0% of equity value.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Matching rights no longer than four business days.
rules.preferred: Preserve board fiduciary-out and superior proposal termination right.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Special covenants may survive if not tied to damages cap.
rules.preferred: No post-closing survival in public-style merger.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Narrowing only with committee approval.
rules.preferred: Standard carve-outs for market, industry, law, war, pandemic, rates, cyber, and announcement effects, with disproportionate-effect qualifier.
rules.threshold: Escalate omitted market or industry carve-outs.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Up to 3.75% with go-shop.
rules.preferred: 2.5%-3.5% of equity value.

policies.title: Public Merger Escalation and Market Check Policy

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 6 months only if buyer has migration plan and staffed PMO.
rules.preferred: TSA baseline 9-12 months for ERP, payroll, finance, regulatory, and IT.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Seller retains only listed excluded employees.
rules.preferred: Buyer offers employment to all business employees on comparable terms.
rules.threshold: Escalate if WARN risk stays with seller.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Trademark phase-out up to 12 months.
rules.preferred: Narrow transitional trademark and retained-IP license.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 3 years maximum.
rules.preferred: Limited to divested line and existing geographies.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 60 days with complete consent package.
rules.preferred: 75-90 days where consents and TSA schedules remain open.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: 12% fallback with identified revenue recognition risk.
rules.preferred: 10% escrow for hybrid control investments.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Discount only for illiquidity approved by committee.
rules.preferred: Rollover equity issued on same implied valuation as buyer cash.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Observer right acceptable for under 15% rollover.
rules.preferred: Protective provisions for budget, debt, M&A, and related-party transactions.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Fallback 12.5%.
rules.preferred: General cap at escrow amount.

policies.title: Hybrid Acquisition and Minority Rollover Playbook

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Seller note may offset cash only with written lender consent.
rules.preferred: Cash and rollover allocation must match signed allocation schedule.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
escalation_triggers: target based on stale balance sheet
rules.fallback_position: Collar permitted up to 0.75% of headline value.
rules.preferred: NWC target from agreed peg and true-up at closing.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Aggregate escrow above 13% requires committee.
rules.preferred: General escrow 10%; tax escrow 2%-3% if exposure identified.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Fallback 12% of cash consideration.
rules.preferred: Cap equals general escrow except fundamental and tax reps.
rules.threshold: Escalate cap based on headline instead of cash.

policies.title: Rollover Stock Purchase Risk Allocation Standard

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Must defer to client playbook.
rules.preferred: Generic form uses 10% escrow.
rules.threshold: Template is not authority when client policy differs.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Must be narrowed for enforceability and client policy.
rules.preferred: Generic form has 5-year worldwide restriction.
rules.threshold: Escalate before use in live draft.

rules.basis: Applies to active drafts and latest written client instructions.
rules.fallback_position: Do not use in public merger without committee policy.
rules.preferred: Generic private-target MAE language.
